country.name: Thailand
country.tip: OTOP products are a strong place to start for regional specialities.
country.chinese_tip: 寻找地区特色商品时，OTOP 是很好的起点。

products.name: Baan Mowaan herbal balm jar
products.note: Check destination medicine rules before travel.
products.description: A traditional herbal balm from historic Bangkok Thai-medicine shop Baan Mowaan.
products.why_buy: It is a more heritage-led alternative to mass-market balms.
products.typical_overseas_price: Usually less available or more expensive overseas.
products.savings: Buy locally for broader choice and better value.
products.best_shops: Baan Mowaan, Bamrung Mueang Road.

reviews.body: A useful Thai brand pick with strong gifting appeal.

products.name: Bangkok Balm plai muscle gel
products.note: Pack liquids in checked luggage.
products.chinese_name: 曼谷草本普莱肌肉凝胶
products.description: Thai FDA-registered plai herbal muscle gel from Bangkok Balm.
products.why_buy: It gives travellers a modern, Thailand-made wellness gift.
products.typical_overseas_price: Usually less available or more expensive overseas.
products.savings: Buy locally for broader choice and better value.
products.best_shops: Thai pharmacies and authorised health stores.

reviews.body: A useful Thai brand pick with strong gifting appeal.

products.name: Benjarong hand-painted tea cup
products.note: Request protective wrapping and carry it onboard.
products.description: A hand-painted Benjarong-style ceramic tea cup with traditional Thai colourwork.
products.why_buy: It is a decorative craft keepsake with more depth than standard market souvenirs.
products.typical_overseas_price: Usually less available or more expensive overseas.
products.savings: Buy locally for broader choice and better value.
products.best_shops: Benjarong workshops, ICONSIAM craft stores and OTOP shops.

reviews.body: A useful Thai brand pick with strong gifting appeal.

products.name: Bento squid snack multipack
products.note: Choose mild or hot flavours before gifting.
products.description: Sweet-spicy dried squid snack packs from Thai brand Bento.
products.why_buy: They are bold, inexpensive and unmistakably Thai convenience-store finds.
products.typical_overseas_price: Usually less available or more expensive overseas.
products.savings: Buy locally for broader choice and better value.
products.best_shops: 7-Eleven, Big C, Lotus’s and supermarkets.

reviews.body: A useful Thai brand pick with strong gifting appeal.

products.name: Cha Tra Mue Thai tea mix
products.note: Keep the packet dry and sealed.
products.description: The vivid orange Thai-tea mix from Thailand’s iconic Cha Tra Mue brand.
products.why_buy: It is the easiest way to recreate Thai milk tea at home.
products.typical_overseas_price: Usually imported at a 30–70% premium, when stocked at all.
products.savings: Buy locally to avoid import mark-ups and get the widest choice.
products.best_shops: Cha Tra Mue shops, Big C, Lotus’s and supermarkets.
products.airport_availability: Often available in selected airport food or duty-free shops; check stock before departure.
products.online_availability: Sometimes sold by specialist grocers and marketplaces; check freshness and import rules.

photos.alt_text: Cha Tra Mue Thai tea mix

reviews.body: A useful Thai brand pick with strong gifting appeal.
Packed well and made a thoughtful gift. I would buy it again from a local shop.
Good value compared with imported options; check the label and keep the receipt.

products.name: Chao Sua rice cracker gift pack
products.note: Keep boxes level in luggage.
products.description: A crispy rice-cracker gift pack from Thai snack brand Chao Sua.

products.name: Coconut roll gift tin

products.name: Elephant pants

products.name: Hong Thai Formula 2 herbal inhaler
products.note: Keep a few sealed jars for easy gifting.

products.name: Jim Thompson Thai silk scarf
